headline: Kinder Morgan (KMI) Valuation Check As Recent Share Price Momentum Faces Mixed Shorter Term Returns
summary: Kinder Morgan stock in focus Kinder Morgan (KMI) is back on investor radars after recent share price moves, with the stock showing mixed shorter term returns but stronger performance over the past 3 months and year to date. See our latest analysis for Kinder Morgan. Recent trading has cooled slightly, with the 1 day and 7 day share price returns in negative territory, but the 90 day share price return of 21.97% and strong multi year total shareholder returns suggest momentum has been building...
